messages.currencyNotAllowedForChannel: Currency is not allowed for the method.
messages.checkoutSuccessInProcess: Checkout completed. The payment is now being processed.
messages.cannotChangeMethod: Cannot change the method. Only an admin user is allowed to change.
messages.cannotChangeAmountAutomatedChannel: Cannot change the amount as the payment method is automated.
messages.cannotChangeExpirationDateAutomatedChann: Cannot change the expiration date as the payment method is automated.
messages.cannotChangeStatusForAutomatedChannel: Cannot change the status as the payment method is automated. Only an admin user is allowed to change the status manually.
messages.cannotSetExpired: The status cannot be set to Expired manually.
messages.draftMessage: The payment request is in Draft status. To proceed, it must be set to Pending.
messages.generateNewReferenceIdConfirmation: Are you sure you want to generate a new reference ID? The payment URL will be changed.
messages.accountMismatch: Account does not match the invoice account.
messages.invoicesCurrencyCodeMismatch: Invoices with different currencies cannot be selected.
messages.currencyCodeMismatch: Amount currency does not match the currency of the invoice.
